title: Tick 13: seed D2 failing pairs covering every HeuristicVerifier failure mode

all 20 pairs verified to score strictly below 3.5
pairs distributed across clarity citation_quality confidence_calibration coverage decision_usefulness and combined buckets

capabilities: 20 failing pairs seeded covering all 5 rubric dimensions plus combined
all 20 verified strictly below the canonical floor
